title: HorizonReports
description: ⚡ Streamline Player Reports with an Intuitive GUI! ⚡
body:
HorizonReports – The Ultimate GUI-Based Reporting Plugin

⚡ Streamline Player Reports with an Intuitive GUI! ⚡

Say goodbye to messy in-game reports! HorizonReports brings a sleek and efficient GUI-based reporting system, making it easier than ever for players to report rule-breakers while giving admins full control over report management.

Features:  
✅ GUI Reports – Players can /report <username> and select a reason from an interactive menu  
✅ Custom Report Reasons – Add, edit, or remove reasons directly in the config  
✅ Customizable Everything – Modify text, commands, reports, and permissions  
✅ “Other” Reason Option – Allows players to type custom report reasons (max length configurable)  
✅ Easy Report Management – Admins can delete reports after handling them  
✅ Lightweight & Optimized – No performance impact, runs smoothly on all servers  
✅ 1.18-1.21.4

Perfect for:  
✔️ Survival & SMP Servers  
✔️ Minigames & Competitive Modes  
✔️ Factions, Skyblock, & More!  

Keep your server safe & organized with HorizonReports!  

HorizonReports commands:  
commands:  
/reports help  

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/481f2c58782bac8b70886f7c830962aa74c07eed.png)  
/report username (the gui is customizable in config.yml you can change the name the colors the glass pane to another item/color and many more)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b86d3081884c56ceaecc94884464ddf11ade466.png)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207df87c33067f0d8fa384cfba428f1a30cf8e0e.png)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7848948852a0792997e4ea31300a09eca8a72988.png)  


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/163a472036ca2405331f0af9a9f2935cd0d1cb7e.png)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/319a1405b9a9e0b0f74bfe60476921c5611519b0.png)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514ee4836489f030992a3b9ffb30a2c23ba8542e.png)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3dde621c55aa86bec664dab434f18fc747366b8.png)


/report username other (the max 24 characters is customizable in config.yml)  

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11882be4477a7c6b3db45ae037a89ceb8c502c68.png)  
Staff Commands:  
/reports history (shows all reports made to what person)  

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a847daf32e4c6586239e502d469bef5fe6dcd54d.png)  
/reports urgent (shows top 10 (editable in config.yml) urgent reports aka players with most reports)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc956ab7b8c111a33848f4bb342cce3d807ba730.png)  
/reports delete [player/all] (deletes all/players reports)  

/reports delete player  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bda031c19d76f431761d5f6aa4c1ab2116da2dd8.png)  
/reports delete all  

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f6e01de32fa6aefc95de3608dca783db83d134f.png)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58591c47bad5a1082aa40ba41a706c4b4116af9f.png)  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c39be37275e3fb38cf5ed7dec15f8af0f4339121.png)
